name: Christmas Oyster Soup (Soupe Aux Huitres De Noel)
recipeIngredient: 2 Carrots, medium - peeled and grated into long, thin shreds
4 cups Milk, or 1/2 milk and 1/2 cream
4 cups Oysters - salt and pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and grate the carrots into long, thin shreds.
2. Add the finely diced celery to a saucepan with the grated carrots.
3. Melt butter in the saucepan and add the vegetables.
4. Stir the mixture until well combined.
5. Cover and simmer over very low heat for 20 minutes, ensuring the vegetables do not brown.
6. Gradually add milk (or 1/2 milk and 1/2 cream) to the pan.
7. Bring the mixture to a boil.
8. Heat the oysters in an enamelled cast iron pan over medium heat; avoid boiling them.
9. Pour the oysters into the soup and stir until well mixed.
10. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
11. Serve immediately, as the soup may curdle if left standing for too long.
12. The milk and vegetables can be prepared ahead of time, while the oysters should be heated and served at the last minute.
